creator: skr.bek@centrum.cz
text:
I have Microsoft Natural Ergonomic Keyboard 4000 connect in USB. I install
new PC with FreeBSD.  The Fn keys (F1, F2, F3, ...) do not work in console
and X too. Do not work ALT+F1, ALT+F2

I tried other keyboard (Chicony) and on this keyboard Fn keys work good.

In FreeBSD 6.1 Microsoft Natural Ergonomic Keyboard 4000 work good (now
I am writing on it

dmesg:
vga0: <Generic ISA VGA> at port 0x3c0-0x3df iomem 0xa0000-0xbffff on isa0
ukbd0: <Microsoft Natural\M-. Ergonomic Keyboard 4000, class 0/0, rev 2.00/1.73, addr 2> o
kbd2 at ukbd0
uhid0: <Microsoft Natural\M-. Ergonomic Keyboard 4000, class 0/0, rev 2.00/1.73, addr 2> o

Full dmesg I attache in file peklo-new-dmesg.txt

Fix: 

# dmesg

	The Regents of the University of California. All rights reserved.
